cash_trend.note: Prior comparison file is dated 2026-04-24 (14 days back). Prior month comparison unavailable until older snapshots accumulate.

summary.note: Filtered to Listed and Make Ready only. 12 homes still need projection data.

true_net_position.note: Home obligations filtered to Listed and Make Ready (active inventory). Sold and Pending Sale homes excluded.

cfo_summary: Total available cash sits at $163,085 across all entities. After this week's approved payments of $59,904, projected end-of-week balance is $103,181. A $5,000 intercompany from FS to CA is moving inside that number to cover an overdraft.
Available cash is down $6,479 from two weeks ago (3.8%). The trend deserves attention but it is not yet alarming. Once we have a full prior-month comparison, the directional read will sharpen.

Country Aire is overdrawn $2,545 on available cash before bills. The driver is a Chase credit card billing artifact: both the March and April utility charges fell into the same statement period. This is timing, not a structural CA cash issue. Moving $5,000 from FS covers the OD and gives CA a buffer through next week.

GRP shows $47,335 in payments against $28,810 available, which makes the GRP projection look negative on paper. The two largest items are Vincent lien payments totaling $30,293 on FS2: 050 and FS2: 014. Both closings have already funded and the proceeds are already in the bank, so the lien outflows are matched by deposits already received.

Reframing the obligations picture: liens against homes total $249,855, but only two homes have projected sale prices entered in the tracker. The remaining 14 homes need projections before we can give Tim an honest net reserve number. Other obligations total $170,000 with $0 reserved. Distribution decisions on Tim and Trent ($97K combined) and the flood plane work ($38K) are the live items.
BvA is suppressed this week. Seven days of May data is not enough to drive pacing decisions and would mislead more than inform. Will resume once we have a meaningful month of activity.

for_ownership.label: Projected end-of-week cash
for_ownership.paragraph: We close this week at roughly $103K available across all accounts after $60K in maintenance, contractor bills, and lien payments go out. Two FS2 home sales closed this period and the proceeds are funding the matching lien releases, so the large GRP outflow is offset by deposits already received. Country Aire is overdrawn this week from a credit card billing timing issue where two months of utility charges landed in one statement, and we are moving $5K from Four Seasons to cover it. Cash is down $6K from two weeks ago, so we are watching the trend. The biggest open items remain the Tim and Trent distributions and the FS flood plane removal work.

next_month_preview: June payroll runs the second week and lands roughly $26K across entities. GRP and GG should be in position to cover their share.
Remaining FS2 lien releases on closed sales will continue clearing as title work catches up. The next likely candidates are FS2: 044, FS2: 029, FS2: 047, and FS2: 01, totaling roughly $76K.
If the FS1 and FS2 flood plane removal work moves forward, that is $38K out of FS or GRP. Funding source needs to be decided before approving the contractor.

April BvA close-out remains open. Need receipt allocations at Countryside, Riverside, and RMF should be cleaned up before the April books are trusted, even though we are not running BvA on light May data.
recap_notes: FS2: 050 and FS2: 014 closings funded this period and the matching $30,293 in Vincent lien releases are clearing this week.
Country Aire is overdrawn $2,545 due to two months of Chase utility charges landing in one billing period. Moving $5K from Four Seasons to cover.
GRP projection shows negative on paper but is fully covered by sale proceeds already deposited.
BvA suppressed for week ending 5/8 due to insufficient May data. Will resume next pull.
2031 W 3rd remains a planned $35K purchase on the watch list, not a sale. Correcting the prior week characterization.
Home Tracker now feeds the dashboard. Need projected sale prices entered for 14 of 16 homes before net reserve math is reliable.
FS2:24 referenced in prior watch list does not match a Home ID in the tracker. Confirm correct ID and reconcile.
